src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/WebSecuri.general_idea: Replace the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with a bean-based SecurityFilterChain configuration required by Spring Security 5.7+/6.x.
Switch from the deprecated authorizeRequests() to the new authorizeHttpRequests() API.
Replace deprecated mvcMatchers() with the new requestMatchers() API for path matching.

src/main/java/de/rieckpil/blog/customer/.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.general_idea: Update RemoteWebDriver instantiation to use the newer constructor signature accepting Selenium address and capabilities.
Replace deprecated @LocalServerPort with Environment property injection to retrieve the random server port in Spring Boot 3.
src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise1.human_impl: Removed @LocalServerPort field; added @Autowired Environment and used environment.getProperty("local.server.port", Integer.class).

src/test/java/de/rieckpil/blog/exercise7.general_idea: Manually import WebSecurityConfig to ensure security filters are applied in WebMvcTest, addressing changes in Spring Boot 2.7+ behavior regarding SecurityFilterChain beans.
Manually import WebSecurityConfig to ensure security filters are applied in WebMvcTest context, addressing changes in Spring Boot 2.7+ behavior regarding SecurityFilterChain beans.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.6.3 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
Set the target Java version to 21 to utilize the new JDK features.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java Development Kit used in the CI pipeline from version 17 to 21.

.java-version.general_idea: Update the declared Java version in the project configuration from 17 to 21 to align with the migration target.
